query: INSERT INTO device_skill_state (workspace_id, device_key_id, skill_id, applied_commit, reported_at) SELECT $1, $2, r.skill_id, r.applied_commit, $3 FROM UNNEST($4::TEXT[], $5::BYTEA[]) AS r(skill_id, applied_commit) JOIN catalog cat ON cat.workspace_id = $1 AND cat.skill_id = r.skill_id ON CONFLICT (workspace_id, device_key_id, skill_id) DO UPDATE SET applied_commit = excluded.applied_commit, reported_at = excluded.reported_at WHERE device_skill_state.detached = 0
